sessions.title: Session 1 - Apartment 114
sessions.body:
Damien is Dead (CotU member)
BCI has something suspicious going on
Cyberpsycho near the office (RA agent seen)
Ash is struggling

sessions.title: Session 3 - The Trace
sessions.body:
From Mozzie's POV : 

After we met with COTU in the basement of the Rust and Bile last session, you tweaked out a bit with your pills and they put you in one of their safe houses to sleep while we moved on to the mission. Also, while not confirmed by the DM, it's absolutely rumored that you shit your pants.

We start at the terminal where we hacked the memory shard the prior session. Everything has gone on lockdown and the BCI alarms are blaring. We attempt to physically pick the lock on a door and fail (dope minigame now that we understand it better) but we successfully hack an electronic lock on another door (equally dope mini game, will see it again and harder in the future). This leads us to  tunnel where we escape up a ladder through a sewer grate as the tunnels we were in got flooded.

While crawling out a BCI guard spots us and shoots. We fight back and start kicking his ass when all of a sudden we hear a boom and another guard surprise attacks us, blasting Colton in the tummy with a 50 cal, taking him to 1 hp. I jam my machete into the first guys brain after Colton softened him up real nice, then he provided suppressive fire while I ran for the second guy who was now spraying us with an SMG.

Unfortunately, he got off another shot with the sniper and blew Colton's leg off, sending him to 0 hp. I get to that guy, shover my 9mm in his mouth and blow it out the back of his neck. I get back to Colton in a hurry, put my belt on his leg as a tourniquet, shove a balled up shirt in his stomach hole, and pocket his data shard that he was about to drop. I then carry him to the nearest sketchy medical place a few blocks away.

The doc agrees to fix him and refuses my money. He and his machines give Colton a cybernetic leg and a portion of his torso and ribs. While Colton is down I look at his data shard that he was clutching and see it has a DNA match. Apparently he's a father to some girl I've never seen or heard of before. 

The doctor reveals he owns the Rust and Bile, he knows who we are, COTU "works" for him even if they don't see it that way, and he really wants to talk to you. His name is Kade. Colton wakes up flustered, we sedate him, then he finally wakes up and recovers after some injections. He's feeling better but not good with the cybernetics yet and he is still suffering from the trauma of the serious wound and surgery, even after getting some hp back.

Kade sets off a distraction (without asking us) to ensure the enforcers look elsewhere, though he implies it may have cost some lives. All he wants in return is for us to come back another time, but with you. 

We depart, take the safe route home, stop to check the dead bodies outside the Rust and Bile, which was raided, and head to the office. You have been unreachable, but you weren't among the bodies. Also, none of them seemed to be the COTU people from the basement. We get back to the office safely but you're not there and your terminal is locked down by your normal security. We are about to call Dax, but Colton confronts me about what I saw on the data shard. He doesn't share anything beyond confirmation that he has a daughter he didn't know about.

Before we call Dax or do anything else, there is a knock on the door. Colton answers and it's his smoking hot baby momma. Nyx. They talk and she introduces herself, then the session ends.
